scripts.load-test: set RESULTS_FILE=load-test-results.json&& set REPORT_FILE=load-test-report.html&& node tests/load/load-test-runner-bypass-auth-100.js && start load-test-report.html
scripts.load-test:50: set RESULTS_FILE=load-test-results-50.json&& set REPORT_FILE=load-test-report-50.html&& node tests/load/load-test-runner-bypass-auth-50.js && start load-test-report-50.html
scripts.load-test:real-auth: set LOAD_TEST_REAL_AUTH=true&& set RESULTS_FILE=load-test-results-real-auth.json&& set REPORT_FILE=load-test-report-real-auth.html&& node tests/load/load-test-runner-real-auth-100.js && start load-test-report-real-auth.html
scripts.test:rate-limit: set LOAD_TEST=true&& node tests/rate-limit/rate-limit-test.js && start rate-limit-test-report.html
